title: Q Poster
wikitext:
[]: Q Poster             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Feb 09, 2016 8:13 pm This appeared to be the right place to post this so I wanted to see if any of you fine people would know of a place on the interwebs from which I may purchase an affordable, large poster for Q, specifically the Shinji and Kaworu one? Thanks!

[]: Re: Q Poster             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Feb 09, 2016 8:28 pm ^ Try ebay... I'm so happy, I have it framed on my wall :3 I had a hard time finding it in Tokyo, even when Q was in cinemas, because it was sold out everywhere. Due to a stroke of luck I found one vagrant poster in a small Anime shop one day before leaving. Man, I was so happy... Sorry for the brag, but no one in RL is able to relate, lol.

[]: Re: Q Poster             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Feb 09, 2016 10:08 pm Thanks. I did check there but it was around $70. That sounds rad though. Glad you were able to find one.

[]: Re: Q Poster             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Feb 09, 2016 10:17 pm ^ Well, that's a bummer. You might be able to find a hi-res image and let it print?

[]: Re: Q Poster             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Wed Feb 10, 2016 1:21 am Thanks for the tip. $20 over $70. I'll take it

[]: Re: Q Poster             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Feb 16, 2016 9:47 pm f.y.e. was throwing in the poster if you preordered 3.33 through them.
